00:00:00:00 - 00:00:05:00
Speaker 1
The real challenge is not speed, it is trust in the first draft.

00:00:05:00 - 00:00:10:00
Speaker 2
When the handoff is clear, the editor can make a decision in minutes.

00:00:10:00 - 00:00:14:00
Speaker 1
That is the proof: fewer dead ends and a cleaner story.
